final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original post-apocalyptic scene illustration set in a desolate wasteland (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 末日废土 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include armored vehicle in foreground, collapsed city ruins in far background, vast desert in between
Subject: must include a heavily modified armored vehicle (one) in a desolate desert
Scene/backdrop: must include a barren desert landscape with collapsed urban ruins in the distance, windblown sand and dust filling the air
Lighting/mood: needs a tense, end-of-world survival atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusty yellow-brown, overcast direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a gritty, weathered, sand-blasted surface treatment — exact grain and wear level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
